title: User humidifier preference and device context
summary: The user has an online, functional Mijia Smart Anti-bacterial Humidifier 2, confirms 50% as the indoor humidity comfort threshold, permits automatic activation when humidity drops below 50%. When indoor humidity dropped to 29-30% below the threshold, the device was successfully turned on and set to auto mode to maintain the 50% comfort threshold, the operation passed verification and aligns with the user's comfort-first, energy and water efficiency requirements.
details: Device model: Mijia Smart Anti-bacterial Humidifier 2
User confirmed 50% RH as indoor humidity comfort threshold
User permits automatic activation when humidity drops below 50% RH
Automatic activation at 29-30% RH completed successfully with verification passed
Device set to auto mode to maintain 50% RH comfort threshold
